# @platform/contracts-auth

Authentication and session contract package: SessionActor schema, auth request/response shapes, and AuthError subtypes.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/contracts-auth
Version: 0.1.0
Component: contracts-auth
Type: api
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: auth-gateway
Owner: team-security
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: contract
Class: experimental.contract
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: monthly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-security
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own SessionActor Zod schema and TypeScript type for authenticated actor context
- Define auth request and response shapes (LoginRequest, LogoutRequest, SessionResponse)
- Export AuthErrorCode enum for auth-layer error classification
- Define baseline role and permission union types (BaseRole, TenantScopedRole, GlobalRole, Permission)

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement authentication logic
- Does not import Keycloak SDK or any adapter packages
- Does not own session storage or session lifecycle
- Does not import domain packages or React

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by application, platform, and adapter packages that need auth contract types
- Used in API boundaries to validate and type session actor context
